ksa_text: Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures, including data lifecycle management, access control and security, data retention and archival, compliance documentation, and stewardship responsibilities.

dcwf.top_element_label: * Knowledge of risk management processes (e.g., methods for assessing and mitigating risk).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: * Knowledge of risk management processes (e.g., methods for assessing and mitigating risk).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-015 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4109 is insufficient to establish relevance to digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.411, nice=0.401, onet=0.396) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4109 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-K-015 (composite 0.4109) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4109 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Digital Evaluator at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4109 is not a standard requirement for Digital Evaluator at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4109, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
